auth_secure_login: Secure login with your Mines account
auth_maintenance_default: Canari is under maintenance. Only administrators can sign in.
auth_pin_min_length: The PIN must be at least 4 characters.
auth_pin_setup_p1: This PIN encrypts all your messages. It is
auth_pin_setup_p2: and cannot be recovered if you forget it.
auth_pin_keep_safe: Write it down and keep it safe.
auth_pin_unlock_desc: Enter your PIN to unlock end-to-end encryption. This PIN is the same on all your devices.

auth_pin_hint_setup_long: At least 4 digits or characters of your choice.
auth_pin_recover_link: My PIN changed on another device → Recover my messages
auth_pin_reset_mid: keeps your account, your posts and the community, but
auth_pin_reset_strong2: permanently erases your encrypted message history
auth_pin_reset_end: . You will be re-invited to your conversations.
auth_pin_reset_confirm: Confirm - erase my messages and reset
auth_changepin_min_length: The new PIN must be at least 4 characters.
auth_changepin_mismatch: The new PIN and its confirmation do not match.
auth_changepin_diff_old: The new PIN must be different from the old one.
auth_changepin_diff_current: The new PIN must be different from the current one.
auth_changepin_recover_p1: Your PIN was changed on another device. Enter your
auth_changepin_recover_p3: to recover all your messages without losing anything.
auth_changepin_change_p1: The PIN encrypts all your messages and is
auth_changepin_change_reconnect: other devices will need to reconnect
auth_changepin_change_p3: with the new PIN (fingerprint will need to be re-enrolled).
auth_biometric_desc: Confirm your identity with your fingerprint or Face ID.
chat_modal_self_conversation_error: You cannot start a conversation with yourself.

chat_devices_load_error: Unable to load devices linked to your account.
chat_delete_device_title: Remove this device from your account
chat_device_stale_groups_warning: {staleGroups} group(s) pending sync. Device will update automatically on next network connection.
chat_change_channel_image_description: Click the icon to change the channel image.
chat_channel_access_description: Define whether the channel is open to all members or restricted to certain users.
chat_no_allowed_members_warning: No authorized members - channel will be inaccessible.
chat_channel_invitations_description: Invite new members to the channel or modify an existing member's role.
chat_community_invite_link_description: Share this link (even outside of Canari): anyone who opens it and logs in automatically joins the club.
call_not_e2e_encrypted_title: NOT end-to-end encrypted call - transport encryption only (server can see stream)
sync_scan_qr_description: Scan this QR code with the device you want to sync, then wait for the operation to complete.
sync_qr_not_supported_error: QR scan not supported on this device. Paste the payload manually.
sync_compatibility_mode_info: Compatibility mode enabled: software scan (if unstable, use manual paste).
sync_paste_code_placeholder: Paste the sync text code generated by the other device here…
sync_paste_manually_label: I can't scan - Paste text code manually
chat_mic_permission_error: Unable to access microphone. Check permissions.
msg_supprimer_definitif: Permanently delete this message? This action is irreversible.
msg_channel_invite_description: You have been invited to join this encrypted channel.
msg_edit_keyboard_hint: Esc to cancel - Ctrl+Enter to confirm
msg_max_reactions_label: Maximum of {max} different reactions on this message.
post_conversations_empty_description: Start a direct message or a private group with your contacts.
post_create_content_required: Post content or an image is required.
post_create_image_token_error: Could not get a token for uploading images.
post_create_poll_requires_options: A poll needs a question and at least two options.
post_create_subtitle: Share an announcement, an event, or a poll with the network.
post_create_validated_events_hint: Only validated calendar events appear here.
profile_bruitages_desc: Message receive, send and read sounds
moderation_subtitle: Reports, hidden posts and restricted users
moderation_hidden_desc: These posts were hidden automatically after reaching 5 reports. They are no longer visible in feeds. Restore them if the report is unfounded, or delete them if justified.
moderation_open_post_with_comment_label: Open the post containing this comment
moderation_mute_reporter_hint: Restrict the account of the person who reported
moderation_mute_author_hint: Restrict the author of the reported content
moderation_auto_hide_hint: Posts reaching 5 reports are automatically hidden here.
moderation_restore_hint: Put the post back in the feeds
moderation_delete_mute_hint: Delete the post and mute the author
moderation_delete_comment_confirm: Delete this comment and its replies?
admin_card_moderation_desc: Moderation of posts reported in the feed.
admin_card_platform_desc: Maintenance mode and minimum client version.
admin_card_status_desc: WebSocket / Redis monitoring of connected devices.
admin_card_users_desc: Grant or revoke global administrator rights.
admin_card_associations_desc: List and public pages of clubs.
admin_card_calendar_desc: Monthly view of all validated events.
admin_push_test_description: Sends a test notification to all registered devices (diagnostic).
admin_stripe_connect_hint: Stripe Connect is configured on each club: public page → Edit → Payments tab.
admin_agenda_subtitle: Validate an event to make it visible on the public agenda and the global calendar.
admin_agenda_reject_modal_desc: The event will be marked as rejected. The club will receive a notification and can see the reason on its page.
admin_agenda_reject_reason_placeholder: E.g.: dates do not comply with the rules, incomplete content…
admin_users_subtitle: Grant or revoke global administration rights.
admin_platform_subtitle: Maintenance and minimum version required client-side (checked before the PIN).
admin_platform_maintenance_toggle_desc: Blocks access for all users except global administrators.
admin_platform_message_placeholder: E.g.: Server update in progress, back around 2pm.
admin_assoc_subtitle: Mark clubs as "BDE". A BDE club unlocks super-roles (validating events, creating clubs, moderating) for its authorized members.
admin_status_legend_ws_html: Active WebSocket connection in the gateway's memory. Each tab open in the app counts as a tab (the "Tabs" column). After a forced stop of the app, the server sends a Ping every 30s: if it doesn't receive a Pong, it closes the connection. The user stays marked "WS connected" for up to ~30s after disconnecting.
admin_status_legend_redis_html: Key user:online:{userId}:{deviceId} in Redis. Created on WS connection, refreshed on every Pong. Automatically removed when the connection closes cleanly.
admin_status_legend_ttl_html: Remaining lifetime of the Redis key. The key expires after 90s without a refresh. Green = healthy, yellow = expiring soon, red = <20s (connection probably dead).
admin_status_legend_anomalies_html:
Redis ✓ but WS -: connection closed (e.g. forced app stop) but the Redis key hasn't expired yet. Will disappear within ≤30s.
WS ✓ but Redis -: active connection but presence never written (gateway bug) or TTL expired without refresh.
admin_status_anomalies_heading: {count} anomaly(ies) - WS and Redis out of sync
admin_status_anomalies_desc: Yellow background = WS and Redis disagree on the device's status.
admin_status_no_anomalies: No anomalies - WS and Redis are in sync on all devices
chat_gif_not_configured: GIF search not configured (KLIPY key missing).
chat_tab_follower_message: Encrypted messaging active in another tab.
chat_sync_overlay_description: The rest of the application remains accessible during synchronisation.
chat_group_dm_subtitle: This conversation is private between two participants.
chat_group_invite_link_description: Share this link: anyone who opens it and logs in will be added to the group once a member is online.
chat_group_invite_description_prefix: Select one or more users to invite to
asso_flag_post_as: Post on behalf of the club
asso_calendar_subtitle: Monthly calendar — click a day to see details.
asso_calendar_pending_note: New events are pending validation before publication.
asso_calendar_modal_pending_note: The event will be visible to everyone after validation by an administrator.
asso_calendar_poster_after_save_note: You will be able to add a poster after creating the event.
asso_calendar_subscribe_intro: To add this club's events to your personal calendar:
asso_calendar_manual_step3: In the left menu, click the + next to 'Other calendars'
asso_calendar_apple_intro: Click the button below to subscribe automatically:
asso_calendar_subscribe_note: The subscription covers roughly 3 past months and 12 months ahead. The feed is regenerated server-side on each sync.
asso_calendar_error_title_required: Title and start date are required.
asso_doc_password_warning: A password-protected document can only be opened with this password — even a BDE admin cannot access it. A lost password is permanently unrecoverable.
asso_doc_confirm_replace: A document named "{name}" already exists. Replace it?
asso_logo_pick_hint: Pick a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
asso_edit_no_manage_permission: You do not have permission to edit the profile (MANAGE_MEMBERS flag required).
asso_edit_logo_remove_confirm: Remove the logo displayed on the feed and public page?
asso_members_subtitle: Roles shown on the public page. Manage each member's access rights.
asso_members_tags_desc: Tags granted via the shop or manual assignment. Past purchases are also visible in the Purchases tab.
asso_members_no_active_tags: No active status at the moment.
asso_forms_subtitle: Forms linked to this club. Validate pending cash payments.
asso_forms_stripe_missing_no_manage: Some forms are paid but Stripe Connect is not configured. Ask a manager with Manage Stripe Connect access to activate it.
asso_forms_stripe_missing_strong: Stripe Connect is not yet configured
asso_forms_stripe_missing_suffix: . Online payments will not work until you
asso_forms_stripe_configure_link: set up Stripe in the Payments tab
asso_forms_no_forms: No forms linked to this club.
asso_achats_subtitle: Payment history for shop products and paid forms. Grant a product manually (cash, pre-Canari payment).
asso_achats_grant_tag_hint: The tag {tag} will be granted automatically.
asso_achats_grant_topup_hint: Cercle top-ups are not credited automatically — use the Cercle interface if needed.
asso_achats_grant_other_hint: The purchase will appear in history as a manual payment.
asso_achats_grant_amount_error: Please enter the amount paid for this product.
asso_boutique_subtitle: Products available on /shop and the club's public page.
asso_boutique_stripe_pending: Stripe Connect under review. Products will be created inactive until the account is activated (usually within a few days).
asso_boutique_stripe_not_configured: Stripe Connect not configured. Products will be created inactive until onboarding is complete.
asso_boutique_stripe_see_above: See the Stripe Connect section above.
asso_boutique_stripe_ask_manager: Ask a manager with Stripe Connect access.
asso_boutique_fixed_price_label: Fixed price (€) — leave empty for pay-what-you-want only
asso_boutique_max_per_user_label: Max per user (leave empty for unlimited)
asso_boutique_no_repeat_hint: Without multiple purchases, a user can only buy once (renewal possible if the membership tag has expired).
asso_boutique_delete_product_confirm: Delete product "{name}"? This action is irreversible.
asso_danger_archived_desc_asso: The club is archived: it appears under 'Former' and is no longer listed in members' 'My clubs'. You can reactivate it.
asso_danger_archived_desc_list: The list is archived: it appears under 'Former' and is no longer listed in members' 'My clubs'. You can reactivate it.
asso_danger_unarchived_desc_asso: Moves the club to 'Former' without deleting anything. Reversible at any time.
asso_danger_unarchived_desc_list: Moves the list to 'Former' without deleting anything. Reversible at any time.
asso_danger_delete_desc_asso: Permanently deletes the club and its links (members, calendar events). Feed messages may remain visible depending on server policy.
asso_danger_delete_desc_list: Permanently deletes the list and its links (members, calendar events). Feed messages may remain visible depending on server policy.
asso_danger_archive_confirm_asso: Archive the club? It will move to 'Former' and disappear from members' 'My clubs'.
asso_danger_archive_confirm_list: Archive the list? It will move to 'Former' and disappear from members' 'My clubs'.
asso_danger_delete_confirm_asso: Delete the club? This action is irreversible.
asso_danger_delete_confirm_list: Delete the list? This action is irreversible.
asso_stripe_balance_pending_note: Pending funds will become available after Stripe's processing delay. Payouts are managed on the club's Stripe dashboard (Standard account).
asso_stripe_verification_pending_desc: Your application has been submitted. Stripe typically validates the account within a few hours to a few business days — no action is required from you at the moment.
asso_stripe_restricted_desc: Stripe has restricted this Connect account. Check the {link} or contact Stripe support.
asso_stripe_unavailable: Stripe is not configured on the server.
asso_stripe_complete_setup: Complete the setup on Stripe, or wait for validation if you have just submitted your application.
asso_stripe_connect_account: Connect a Stripe account for payments on this club's forms, shop, and ticketing.
asso_doc_vault_desc: Client-side encrypted documents (AES-256-GCM). Only members with Documents access can download them. The server never sees plaintext content.
